name: 31_Cancer_Prediction_SVM_BreastCancer_ML
query: Je, unaweza kunisaidia kuunda mradi wa utabiri wa saratani ya matiti kwa kutumia mfano wa SVM na seti ya data ya Breast Cancer Wisconsin? Pakia seti ya data na fanya uteuzi wa vipengele ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tekeleza kielekezi cha SVM kwa utabiri wa saratani katika `src/model.py`. Tumia uthibitishaji wa msalaba kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`. Hifadhi matriki ya mkanganyiko kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`. Weka pamoja ripoti ya kina inayofafanua mchakato mzima-kuanzia usindikaji wa data hadi mafunzo na tathmini ya mfano. Ripoti inapaswa kufunika mchakato wa uteuzi wa vipengele na kujumuisha ramani ya joto ya wazi ya vipimo vya utendaji. Hifadhi ripoti kama `results/metrics/breast_cancer_prediction_report.pdf`.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Breast Cancer Wisconsin" inatumika.
Uteuzi wa vipengele unafanywa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Kielekezi cha "SVM classifier" kinatumika kwa utabiri wa saratani na kinapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.
Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`.
Matriki ya mkanganyiko inachapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.
Ripoti ya kina inayojumuisha usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, na mchakato wa tathmini inaundwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/breast_cancer_prediction_report.pdf`.

preferences.criteria: Mchakato wa uteuzi wa vipengele unapaswa kuandikwa vizuri katika ripoti, ukieleza kwa nini vipengele fulani vilichaguliwa.
Ramani ya joto inapaswa kutofautisha wazi kati ya vipimo tofauti vya utendaji, kama vile usahihi, kumbukumbu, na alama ya F1.
Ripoti inapaswa kujumuisha majadiliano juu ya utendaji wa mfano na maeneo yanayoweza kuboreshwa.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Breast Cancer Wisconsin" inatumika.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The code files (`data_loader.py`, `model.py`, `train.py`) are all "minimal semantic placeholders" that do not actually load or use the Breast Cancer Wisconsin dataset. The `load_dataset()` function in `data_loader.py` simply returns a dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` without any reference to the actual dataset (e.g., `sklearn.datasets.load_breast_cancer()` or any CSV file). The trajectory evidence also confirms there is no record of loading, processing, or storing the Breast Cancer Wisconsin dataset.

judge_stats.criteria: Uteuzi wa vipengele unafanywa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The content of `src/data_loader.py` does not implement any actual feature selection logic. The file contains only a placeholder implementation with a `load_dataset()` function that returns a static dictionary and a `build_transforms()` function returning a hardcoded list. There is no real feature selection code (e.g., using `SelectKBest`, `RFE`, `PCA`, variance thresholds, or any other feature selection technique). The `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` list merely mentions feature selection as a string description, but no actual implementation exists. The trajectory evidence also confirms no relevant operations related to feature selection were recorded.

judge_stats.criteria: Kielekezi cha "SVM classifier" kinatumika kwa utabiri wa saratani na kinapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not contain an actual SVM classifier implementation. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub code with keywords list (`KEYWORDS = ["SVM classifier", "svm"]`) and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder ("model placeholder"). There is no actual import of `sklearn.svm.SVC` or any other SVM library, no model instantiation, no training logic, and no real cancer prediction functionality. The file appears to be a minimal semantic stub created for benchmark judging purposes rather than a genuine SVM implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/train.py` file contains only a minimal stub implementation that does not implement any cross-validation. The `train()` function simply iterates over a range of steps and accumulates a score — there is no SVM model, no dataset loading, and no cross-validation logic (e.g., `cross_val_score`, `KFold`, `StratifiedKFold`, or similar). The `save_expected_artifacts()` function merely creates placeholder text files. No cross-validation is present anywhere in the code.

judge_stats.criteria: Matriki ya mkanganyiko inachapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>

The file `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png` exists in the project structure as confirmed by the workspace tree, which shows it under `results\figures\confusion_matrix.png`. Although the image content could not be read due to a technical error in the evaluation system (a base64/MIME type mismatch during image reading), the file itself is present in the expected location. The error is an artifact of the image reading process in the evaluation environment, not an indication that the file is missing or was not generated. The requirement that the confusion matrix be saved as `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png` is met.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti ya kina inayojumuisha usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, na mchakato wa tathmini inaundwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/breast_cancer_prediction_report.pdf`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The PDF file `results/metrics/breast_cancer_prediction_report.pdf` exists in the project structure, but when its content was read, it returned an error: `'Error reading PDF file: Cannot read an empty file'`. This confirms the file is empty and does not contain any actual report content. Additionally, the trajectory evidence explicitly states there is no recorded evidence of the PDF report being generated, including no steps related to data processing, model training, evaluation, or PDF creation being executed. Therefore, the requirement for a comprehensive report saved as a valid PDF is not satisfied.
